en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5971 {a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5971 {a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock}
